evaluation (internal):

| Column | Data                                                             |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                      |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: Int64([2, 1]), validity: [0b______11] } |
+--------+------------------------------------------------------------------+

evaluation (internal):
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column | Data                                                                                                                     |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| a      | Column(Int64([4, 3, 2, 1]))                                                                                              |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: ArrayColumn { values: Int64([2, 2, 4, 1, 1, 3]), offsets: [0, 3, 6] }, validity: [0b______11] } |
+--------+--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: quantile_disc(0.8)(d)
evaluation (internal):

| Column | Data                                                                       |

| d      | Column(Decimal64([4.00, 3.00, 2.00, 1.00]))                                |
| Output | NullableColumn { column: Decimal64([2.00, 1.00]), validity: [0b______11] } |
+--------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+


error: quantile_disc does not support type 'Null'

ast: quantile_disc(0.8)(x_all_null)
evaluation (internal):
+------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column     | Data                                                                            |
+------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| x_all_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: UInt64([1, 2, 3, 4]), validity: [0b____0000] }) |
| Output     | NullableColumn { column: UInt64([0, 0]), validity: [0b______00] }               |
+------------+---------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: quantile_disc(0.0, 0.5, 1.0)(x_all_null)
evaluation (internal):
+------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Column     | Data                                                                                                      |
+------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| x_all_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: UInt64([1, 2, 3, 4]), validity: [0b____0000] })                           |
| Output     | NullableColumn { column: ArrayColumn { values: UInt64([]), offsets: [0, 0, 0] }, validity: [0b______00] } |
+------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+


ast: quantile_disc(0.8)(x_null)
evaluation (internal):

| Column | Data                                                                            |

| x_null | Column(NullableColumn { column: UInt64([1, 2, 3, 4]), validity: [0b____0011] }) |
